response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r4c2 is on the distrusted peers list and their SoC (0.44) remains below your minimum sharing threshold (0.5); combined with your belief that geographic neighbors exploit one-way energy flows, accepting would violate conservative policy and expose you to further asymmetric drain.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
